title: Step S-SWQT-0024: 全量 Agent 文档、组件披露与 Icon 参考面强约束

sourceFeature.href: ../feature/F-SWQT-0008-swui-mcp-渐进披露-发布新鲜度与消费端设计规范强约束.json

items.statement: 把消费端硬约束推广到两个包、全部组件披露面和 Portal /icons 参考页，同时保持同步真源与有界上下文。

inScope: 全部 MCP 组件查询和精确资源
Portal /icons、导航和 /agent 主动参考顺序
outOfScope: 新增图标库或自绘 SVG
组件源码复制或本地 fork

testDrivenDesign.testCaseDesign: 所有 catalog.search/component.get/exact resource 共享合同 refs 与绝对 Portal URL；UI/token Agent 文档包含同一强制顺序；/icons 使用 Lucide named imports 和现有控件。
testDrivenDesign.acceptanceToTestMapping: MCP unit 覆盖全部工具/资源；sync-docs 与 packed parity 覆盖包文档；Portal browser/a11y 覆盖 /icons 和导航；design/html gates 覆盖视觉与语义。
testDrivenDesign.riskToTestLevelMapping: public payload -> unit/schema; package truth -> packed consumer; icon/reference UI -> browser/a11y; bounded disclosure -> byte/count budgets。
testDrivenDesign.regressionTestDesign: 断言稳定资源总数上限、HTML resource URI、contractRefs 唯一性、绝对 URL、Lucide 图标策略和无 emoji/自绘 SVG。
testDrivenDesign.coverageMetric: 所有公开 MCP 读取面和两个发布包文档面均有自动断言
testDrivenDesign.residualRisk: 真实 Agent 遵从度无法由静态测试完全证明。

items.explanationSyncBrief: 两个包对同一合同只做短硬提醒，正文由 foundation/HTML docs 和 Portal 参考页承载。
items.problemDefinition: 约束分散且 /icons 缺失；本地新增 HTML-first 规则没有贯穿全部 MCP、包和 Portal 暴露面。
items.requirementsDefinition: 同步两个包 first-hop 文档；注册 HTML resource；扩展所有组件 payload；新增 /icons 与 /agent 主动参考顺序；维持资源与字节预算。
nonGoals: 不新增图标依赖或品牌 glyph。
不创建 AppShell/TopBar 产品层抽象。

plainLanguage.unclear: 为什么 token 包也要提醒控件和 HTML。
plainLanguage.why: Agent 可能从 token 包开始构建页面，必须尽早知道颜色只是基础且控件应来自 @swqt/ui。
plainLanguage.outcome: 无论从哪个包或组件查询进入，都会被导向同一版本锁定规则和真实参考站。
plainLanguage.prose: 入口可以不同，规则真源和实现路径必须一致。

options.name: 共享合同 helper + 同步包文档 + Portal icons route

recommendedOption.rationale: 唯一覆盖所有消费入口且不复制合同正文的方案。
recommendedOption.assumptionsFromFeature: 现有 sync-docs 仍是 MCP 文档副本唯一生成路径。
recommendedOption.assumptionChanges: 若目录映射变化，先修生成器而不是手改副本。

granularity.whySmallEnough: Agent 文档、MCP payload 和 /icons 共享同一 consumer contract 扩展不变量。
granularity.whyNotSplitFurther: 分拆会允许某一入口短期缺失同一约束。
granularity.splitSignals: 若 icons 需要新增交互组件或设计资产，另拆 UI Feature。

readiness.reason: 合同、路由、工具 schema、文档同步和测试路径均明确。

forwardImpact.resolution: 同步资源数、first-hop 与 Portal 路由。
运行全矩阵并记录产物字节一致性。

items.profileNote: full public-contract Step；Axis positioning=library/SDK+docs+Portal，公共 payload 与用户可见导航要求完整 brief。

executionContract.expectedChangeSurface: UI/token Agent docs, all component MCP disclosures, Portal /icons and /agent navigation, synchronized generated docs and bounded-resource tests.
executionContract.acceptanceCriteria: Every entry path exposes the same strict consumer contract; /icons uses Lucide and package controls; Portal, MCP and docs-sync gates pass without exceeding budgets.
executionContract.validationEvidenceRequired: Portal build/type/unit/MCP smoke, targeted light/dark browser and HTML/Axe checks, docs sync, catalog, design and HTML contracts.
executionContract.rollbackNotes: Revert docs, Portal route and additive MCP fields together so no entry promises a missing reference.

implementationSummary.whatChanged: Strengthened UI/token AGENTS, llms and adoption/design guidance; expanded all component payloads; added /icons with Lucide examples and accessible policy; updated /agent and navigation; synchronized 12 generated docs.
implementationSummary.whySatisfiesStep: Every pre-install and post-install entry now leads to the same blocking contract and active Portal references.
implementationSummary.intentionallyUnchanged: No new icon dependency, local component fork, product shell, npm publish or production deploy.

changeSurface.codeAnchors: examples/portal/src/pages/IconsPage.tsx; AgentPage.tsx; navigation.ts; main.tsx; server catalog/handlers.
changeSurface.documentationAnchors: packages/ui{,-tokens}/AGENTS.md, llms.txt, docs; docs/experience/foundation-contract.md and portal-and-mcp.md.
changeSurface.dataOrMigrationAnchors: No data migration; generated docs are rebuilt from SSOT.

executionNotes.decisionsDuringImplementation: Use response-level refs for bounded search, exact-resource refs for standalone reads, fully qualified Portal URLs, and multiline=false SourceCode on /icons to avoid Radix ScrollArea style injection in the validated document.
executionNotes.deviationsFromBrief: The /icons HTML check found and avoided an existing ScrollArea authoring issue without changing the shared component outside this Step.
executionNotes.risksDiscovered: The static resource budget reaches the declared ceiling of 12; future stable resources require consolidation or a revised budget.

validationReferences.commandOrEvidence: Portal build/typecheck and 20 unit tests; MCP smoke
validationReferences.notes: All schemas, resources, tools and synchronized docs pass.

validationReferences.commandOrEvidence: Targeted Portal browser /icons, navigation and /agent in light/dark
validationReferences.notes: 8/8 passed with Axe and /icons offline HTML conformance.

validationReferences.commandOrEvidence: sync-docs:check; catalog-export; design contract; HTML standards
validationReferences.notes: 12 docs synchronized; 88 catalog exports, 309 package exports and 88 demos.

blocker.reason: All Step-local code, docs and focused gates pass.
blocker.recoveryTrigger: New stable resource, icon library policy, Portal route or package first-hop change.
blocker.residualRisk: Full browser and packed matrices remain for S-SWQT-0025.

items.projectFactUpdateCandidates: update-now in S-SWQT-0025: resource count, /icons route, 1.1.0 source contract and validation commands.

items.guardedRiskDomain: Cross-package Agent contract, public MCP disclosure, user-visible Portal navigation and icon policy.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Changes are limited to the consumer contract expansion, all disclosure entries and /icons; R-SWQT-0002 and full brief cover the public-contract risk.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: searched for another icon dependency, emoji policy, source copies, raw colors, external fonts and AppShell additions; none were added.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Existing repository files outside touched guidance may still contain historical wording.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Build/type/unit/MCP, targeted 8-case light/dark browser, Axe, /icons HTML, docs sync, catalog, design and HTML gates pass.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: exercised resource ceiling, broad payload budget, generated-byte drift, mobile/desktop navigation and source code markup.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Full browser matrix and packed consumers are deferred to the explicit final validation Step, not skipped.

gateOutcomes.evidence: Root docs reach the contract/release delta; package docs are version-locked SSOT; generated copies are machine-checked; Feature/Step/Research links are stable.
gateOutcomes.counterEvidenceChecked: yes: production and npm remain labeled 1.0.0/stale rather than inheriting local 1.1.0.
gateOutcomes.residualRisk: Dated companion fact needs final outside-in refresh.

items.testSufficiency: passed for Step scope; all new UI/protocol logic has automated contract/browser coverage and no hard gate is skipped.
items.conditionalGates: DDL not-applicable; sibling skip rollup not-applicable.
items.projectCompanionFactDisposition: update-now in S-SWQT-0025 after full matrix and remote probes.
items.ssotImpactPrerequisite: passed: package Agent/docs and foundation contract are updated; generated MCP copies match.
items.residualRisk: Static resources are at the current ceiling; future growth must remain progressive.
items.followUp: Run full local/packed/npm/production evidence matrix in S-SWQT-0025.

items.finalDocumentEntry: .sw/workflow/steps/S-SWQT-0024-全量-agent-文档-组件披露与-icon-参考面强约束.json
items.validationSummary: Portal build/type/unit/MCP, targeted 8-case browser/Axe/HTML, docs sync, catalog, design and HTML gates passed.
items.testCaseSummary: All component disclosure paths, resource ceiling, package docs byte sync, /icons and /agent navigation have automated evidence.
items.coverageSummary: touched-code: every new branch or public payload field has unit/protocol/browser coverage; full matrix follows in S-SWQT-0025.
items.rootMount: docs/README.md -> consumer foundation contract, Portal/MCP experience and 1.1.0 release delta.
items.evidenceInvalidationTrigger: Package first-hop, MCP disclosure budget, Portal IA or icon/HTML policy change.
items.archiveSynchronization: implemented(stable Step path; promote owns registry/ledger)

requirementAudit.evidence: UI/token AGENTS, llms and adoption docs require the same fonts/icons/colors/controls/HTML/reference sequence; sync-docs passes.
requirementAudit.risk: Consumers can ignore prose without local enforcement.
requirementAudit.followUp: Adopt matching design/HTML gates in consuming repositories.

requirementAudit.requirement: All component disclosure and /icons Portal reference
requirementAudit.evidence: Shared helpers cover search/get/resource; /icons and /agent/navigation pass light/dark browser, Axe and HTML checks.
requirementAudit.risk: Resource list has no remaining count headroom.
requirementAudit.followUp: Prefer templates/tools for future L2 content.

items.workflowRunAudit: Implement and full review evidence are recorded; lifecycle transitions and promotion use deterministic workflow tools.
items.intermediateDocumentStateAudit: Feature breakdown, stable Step, package SSOT, generated docs, Portal and MCP tests agree.
items.documentGovernanceAudit: Root docs and version-locked package files expose the current contract; stale production wording is explicit.
items.ssotProjectionAudit: Package docs and foundation contract are authoritative; sync-docs verifies exact generated projection.
items.temporaryArtifactLifecycle: Workflow payload fixtures are Step-owned and removed at final Feature cleanup; browser artifacts remain tool-owned test output.
items.acceptanceToAuthorityPropagation: The contract propagates to both packages, every component payload, Portal navigation, /agent, /icons and project experience docs.

closingTriad.question: Any unimplemented or unregistered Step work?
closingTriad.evidence: Both requirement rows are implemented and reviewed.

closingTriad.question: Are registry, ledger, Feature breakdown and stable paths aligned?
closingTriad.evidence: Stable Step href matches Feature breakdown and promote updates lifecycle artifacts.

closingTriad.question: Is behavior verified and every exception/skip classified?
closingTriad.evidence: All Step-local gates pass; full-matrix work is a separate designed Step, not an unreported skip.

closingSelfAudit.closingSelfAuditEvidence: Cross-package, MCP and Portal contract expansion is implemented and reviewed.
closingSelfAudit.closingSelfAuditConsistency: No remote publication or deployment is claimed.
closingSelfAudit.pluginSkillFriction: The HTML check exposed Radix ScrollArea style injection for multiline SourceCode; the page uses the valid non-scroll variant.
closingSelfAudit.reusableWorkflowPattern: SSOT docs -> generated resources -> component decision-point refs

items.requiredFollowUp: Complete the full freshness and validation Step.

validationSummary: Portal build/type/unit/MCP, targeted 8-case browser/Axe/HTML, docs sync, catalog, design and HTML gates passed.
